prompt:
I have a Symfony 7 project with Webpack Encore for assets. There's already a Dockerfile but it runs php-fpm as root and uses php:latest as base image. I want to fix the security issues and make it work on Railway. Here's the existing Dockerfile:

FROM php:latest
WORKDIR /app
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y nginx
COPY . .
RUN composer install
COPY .env /app/.env
EXPOSE 80
CMD ["php-fpm"]

assertions.description: Updated Dockerfile pins php version (not php:latest)
Updated Dockerfile creates and uses a non-root user
COPY .env line is removed from the Dockerfile
Security report has a [CRITICAL] finding about .env being baked into the image
Security report flags running as root as [WARNING] or higher
Security report flags php:latest unpinned tag
